title: viola × braunii
intro: Viola × braunii, also known as hybrid viola or viola hybrid, is a cross between V. x intermedia and V. x wittrockiana, belonging to the Violet family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Viola × braunii include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and acting as an antiseptic. The herbal preparations of Viola × braunii can be found in creams, salves, and tinctures, often used to treat minor wounds and skin issues.
